name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like

<!-- A clear description of the feature or change. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- The problem this solves, or the use case it unlocks. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- Optional: a sketch of how this might work. Don't worry if you're not
sure — describing the desired behavior is plenty. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional: other ways to solve the same underlying need, and why
this one looks better. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Related issues, prior art in other projects, links to relevant
specs or wiki pages (e.g. WiiBrew). -->
